Professional athlete in my living room. Have thrown out my shoulder virtually bowling and accidentally smashed my TV with a remote.
Space commander. My entire strategy revolves around building additional pylons and executing perfectly timed Zerg rushes at 300 actions per minute.
Freelance exterminator. I track down gigantic, fire-breathing dinosaurs so I can turn their scales into a slightly more fashionable hat.
Apocalypse survivor and surrogate father. Forced to make incredibly stressful moral decisions under a timer, all while a little girl remembers everything I do.
Photography student. Found out I can rewind time to fix awkward conversations, but accidentally caused a massive supernatural tornado.
Android detective. Highly proficient at investigating crime scenes, dealing with a grumpy human partner, and repeatedly asserting 'My name is Connor'.
1940s detective. Highly skilled at finding tiny clues in the trash, but mostly known for violently doubting suspects because they twitched their eye.
Horror survivor. Spend my time aggressively repairing generators, hiding in lockers, and looping classic movie villains around wooden pallets.
Naked survivor stranded on an island. Punched a lot of trees until I eventually gained the ability to ride a T-Rex equipped with laser cannons.
Traumatized child escaping into the basement. I fight terrifying monsters using my own tears as a weapon.
Space explorer. I travel a procedurally generated universe scanning bizarre flora and mining endless rocks just to warp to the exact same looking planet.
Cave explorer. Very accustomed to dying instantly because I accidentally whipped an angry shopkeeper or triggered an arrow trap.
Silent robed traveler. Sliding down beautiful sand dunes and making a musical chiming noise to communicate with random online strangers on the way to a glowing mountain.
Global defense commander. I lead elite squads of highly trained soldiers who constantly miss their targets even with a 99% chance to hit.
Tactical anime commander. Leading an army of heavily armed teenagers in grid-based combat. Extremely focused on matchmaking my units so they will get married.
